Category: Born in Iran + Iranian Ethnic + Persian
Notes: Core Iranian population: born in Iran with Iranian ethnicity and Persian language

Category: Born in Iran + Iranian Ethnic + No Persian
Notes: Iranians born in Iran who don't speak Persian (often arrived as adults)

Category: Born in Iran + No Iranian Ethnic + Persian
Notes: Born in Iran, non-Iranian ethnic (e.g. Kurdish, Azeri) who speaks Persian

Category: Born in Iran + No Iranian Ethnic + No Persian
Notes: Born in Iran, non-Iranian ethnic, non-Persian speaker

Category: Not Born + Iranian Ethnic + No Persian
Not Born + No Iranian Ethnic + Persian (Included)
Notes: Strict criteria: 2nd/3rd gen, West Asian visible minority, Persian speaker

Category: Not Born + No Iranian Ethnic + Persian (Excluded)
Notes: Likely Afghan, Tajik, other Central Asian Persian speakers; narrow rule excludes
All people born in Iran regardless of ethnicity or language
All people identifying as Iranian ethnic regardless of birthplace
All Persian speakers included in Iranian count
Persian speakers excluded as likely non-Iranian
